---
title: "Lorraine Temple"
image: "../images/lorraine_temple.jpg"
role: intern
programme: [gambling]
project: [afsg_sport]
about: 
  template: trestles
  image-width: 10em
  image-shape: round
listing:
   - id: badges
     contents: "../badges_awarded/lorraine_temple/*.jpg"
     template: ../badges.ejs
   - id : projects
     contents: "../projects/**"
     type: default
     include: 
       people: [lorraine_temple]
     fields: [title, description,funder]
---

Lorraine currently works as a graduate intern in the lab, leading the 2026 intern team on the completion of their project work for the summer.

In 20025-2026, she worked as a research associate on the ASFG funded project which explores how social identification with sports groups predicts gambling behaviour. 

Priot to this, Lorraine contributed to several pieces of research including [metacognition](http://themindlab.uk/posters/metacog_poster.pdf) and [accent perception](http://themindlab.uk/posters/accent_poster.pdf). 

## Projects I have been involved in

::: {#projects}
:::

## Research Training

::: {#badges}

:::
